testcase.name: test_persistent_all_reduce_residual_probe[blackhole-1x4-ring]

failure.message:
TypeError: ttnn.all_reduce(): incompatible function arguments.
Called with: all_reduce(ttnn.Tensor, cluster_axis=1, mesh_device=MeshDevice(1x4 grid, 4 devices), topology=Topology.Ring, num_links=2, memory_config=MemoryConfig(memory_layout=TensorMemoryLayout::WIDTH_SHARDED,buffer_type=BufferType::L1,shard_spec=ShardSpec{grid=[{"start":{"x":0,"y":0},"end":{"x":7,"y":3}], shape=[32, 96], orientation=ShardOrientation::ROW_MAJOR},nd_shard_spec=std::nullopt,created_with_nd_shard_spec=0), dtype=DataType.BFLOAT16)
Available signatures: all_reduce(input_tensor: ttnn.Tensor, *, cluster_axis: int | None = None, subdevice_id: ttnn._ttnn.device.SubDeviceId | None = None, memory_config: ttnn.MemoryConfig | None = None, num_links: int | None = None, topology: ttnn.ccl.Topology | None = None)
